task.description: Displays all buildscript dependencies declared in root project 'Layout Editor'.
Cleans IDEA project files (IML, IPR)
Displays the components produced by root project 'Layout Editor'. [deprecated]
Displays all dependencies declared in root project 'Layout Editor'.
Displays the insight into a specific dependency in root project 'Layout Editor'.
Displays the dependent components of components in root project 'Layout Editor'. [deprecated]
Displays a help message.
Generates IDEA project files (IML, IPR, IWS)
Generates IDEA module files (IML)
Generates IDEA project file (IPR)
Generates an IDEA workspace file (IWS)
Initializes a new Gradle build.
Displays the detected java toolchains.
Displays the configuration model of root project 'Layout Editor'. [deprecated]
Opens the IDEA project
Displays the outgoing variants of root project 'Layout Editor'.
Displays the sub-projects of root project 'Layout Editor'.
Displays the properties of root project 'Layout Editor'.
Displays the configurations that can be resolved in root project 'Layout Editor'.
Displays the tasks runnable from root project 'Layout Editor' (some of the displayed tasks may belong to subprojects).
Generates Gradle wrapper files.
Displays the Android dependencies of the project.
Assemble main outputs for all the variants.
Assembles all the Test applications.
Assembles main output for variant debug
Assembles main output for variant debugAndroidTest
Assembles main output for variant debugUnitTest
Assembles main output for variant release
Assembles main output for variant releaseUnitTest
Assembles and tests this project.
Assembles and tests this project and all projects that depend on it.
Displays all buildscript dependencies declared in project ':layouteditor'.
Build metadata json file containing information about the used Kotlin tooling
Assembles and tests this project and all projects it depends on.
Assemble bundles for all the variants.
Assembles bundle for variant debug
Assembles bundle for variant release
Runs all checks.
Checks whether Jetifier is needed for the current project
Checks that Kotlin Gradle Plugin hasn't reported project configuration errors, failing otherwise. This task always runs before compileKotlin* or similar tasks.
Deletes the build directory.
Cleans IDEA project files (IML, IPR)
Compiles the debugAndroidTest kotlin.
Compiles the debug kotlin.
Compiles the debugUnitTest kotlin.
Compiles the release kotlin.
Compiles the releaseUnitTest kotlin.
Displays the components produced by project ':layouteditor'. [deprecated]
Installs and runs instrumentation tests for all flavors on connected devices.
Runs all device checks on currently connected devices.
Installs and runs the tests for debug on connected devices.
Displays all dependencies declared in project ':layouteditor'.
Displays the insight into a specific dependency in project ':layouteditor'.
Displays the dependent components of components in project ':layouteditor'. [deprecated]
Installs and runs instrumentation tests using all Device Providers.
Runs all device checks using Device Providers and Test Servers.
Displays a help message.
Generates IDEA project files (IML, IPR, IWS)
Generates IDEA module files (IML)
Installs the Debug build.
Installs the android (on device) tests for the Debug build.
Installs the Release build.
Displays the detected java toolchains.
Runs lint on the default variant.
Run lint analysis on the debug variant
Run lint analysis on the release variant
Print text output from the corresponding lint report task
Runs lint on the default variant and applies any safe suggestions to the source code.
Fix lint on the debug variant
Fix lint on the release variant
Print text output from the corresponding lint report task
Run lint on the debug variant
Run lint on the release variant
Run lint analysis with only the fatal issues enabled on the release variant
Print text output from the corresponding lint report task
Run lint with only the fatal issues enabled on the release variant
Displays the configuration model of project ':layouteditor'. [deprecated]
Displays the outgoing variants of project ':layouteditor'.
Displays the sub-projects of project ':layouteditor'.
Displays the properties of project ':layouteditor'.
Displays the configurations that can be resolved in project ':layouteditor'.
Displays the signing info for the base and test modules
Prints out all the source sets defined in this project.
Displays the tasks runnable from project ':layouteditor' (some of the displayed tasks may belong to subprojects).
Run unit tests for all variants.
Run unit tests for the debug build.
Run unit tests for the release build.
Uninstall all applications.
Uninstalls the Debug build.
Uninstalls the android (on device) tests for the Debug build.
Uninstalls the Release build.
Updates the lint baseline using the default variant.
Update the lint baseline using the debug variant
Update the lint baseline using the release variant
Displays the Android dependencies of the project.
Assemble main outputs for all the variants.
Assembles all the Test applications.
Assembles main output for variant debug
Assembles main output for variant debugAndroidTest
Assembles main output for variant debugUnitTest
Assembles main output for variant release
Assembles main output for variant releaseUnitTest
Assembles and tests this project.
Assembles and tests this project and all projects that depend on it.
Displays all buildscript dependencies declared in project ':layouteditor:vectormaster'.
Assembles and tests this project and all projects it depends on.
Assembles a bundle containing the library in debug.
Assembles a bundle containing the library in debug.
Assembles a bundle containing the library in release.
Assembles a bundle containing the library in release.
Runs all checks.
Checks whether Jetifier is needed for the current project
Deletes the build directory.
Cleans IDEA project files (IML, IPR)

Installs and runs instrumentation tests for all flavors on connected devices.
